intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely non-representative of the current physical state. P1 (String of Nickels) is absent/bare soil. P2 (Mexican Mint) and P4 (Silver Guest) are indistinguishable or lost. P3 (Pothos) is the only identifiable specimen, though severely compromised.

plant_audit.P1: Empty pot, soil surface appears undisturbed but devoid of plant matter.
plant_audit.P2: No visible plant structure; pot appears empty.
plant_audit.P3: Pothos specimen shows significant chlorosis and structural collapse; white rabbit anchor remains.
plant_audit.P4: No visible plant structure; pot appears empty.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and damp across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: Presence of eggshell fragments in P3; no fungal growth detected.
biome_observations.desk_surface: Clean, no significant organic matter or spillages.

temporal_deltas.T-5_to_T-3: Initial state shows a singular green stem in P3; other pots are bare.
temporal_deltas.T-2_to_CURRENT: Progressive loss of turgor pressure in P3; the green stem has lost its upright posture and appears to be desiccating or rotting.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of terminal decline. P3 is the only remaining specimen, and it exhibits signs of severe physiological stress, likely due to light deficiency or substrate issues. The other pots are effectively empty.
anomalies: Eggshell fragments in P3 (likely a calcium amendment attempt)
Total absence of expected species P1, P2, and P4
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical environment is failing. Over the 5-day observation period, the Pothos (P3) has transitioned from a weak, singular stem to a state of near-total collapse. The other pots (P1, P2, P4) have remained devoid of life throughout the sequence, suggesting either a failure to germinate or complete mortality prior to the start of the audit. The environment is sterile and lacks the necessary light intensity to support the registered species.
